items.text:
Qurbat

Dil pe jab ishq tera be-ikhtiyaar utara nikla
Har nafas dard bhi tha, har nafas sahara nikla

Hum to khaak-e-rah the, gard-e-safar ho jaate
Tu jo guzra to wohi khaak sitara nikla

Dil ki veerani mein jab yaad ki aahat ubhri
Har taraf tera hi ek noor dobara nikla

Hum ne samjha tha juda tu hai falak ki had tak
Saans li, dil ko jo dekha — tu hamara nikla

Zakhm khulte hi ajab raaz numayan hua phir
Dard jitna bhi tha, sab tera ishara nikla

Ashk tapke to meri rooh mein mehshar barpa
Gham ka har qatra bhi ik noor ka dhara nikla

Hum gunehgaar sahi, phir bhi karam yeh tera
Har khata par bhi tera lutf gawara nikla

Dil ki har gard mein mehka tera hi zikr raha
Har sukoot-e-shab mein tera nazara nikla

Dubte dubte bhi dil tujh se juda ho na saka
Har bhanwar mein bhi tera naam kinara nikla

Main ne khoya to mujhe apni haqeeqat mili
Jo bhi mita tha, wohi ishq dobara nikla

Rooh tanha thi magar teri mehak saath rahi
Raat gehri thi magar noor tumhara nikla

Khaak se uth ke bhi sar teri taraf jhukta raha
Dil ka har sajda tera hi sahara nikla

Bekasi mein bhi ajab lutf-e-qarabat dekha
Doori doori na rahi, tu hi qareeba nikla

Har tamanna ka bharam toot ke bikhar jaata tha
Tera zikr aaya to har khwab sanwara nikla

Saans ruk ruk ke bhi chalti rahi tere dam se
Khauf-e-maut bhi jeene ka sahara nikla

Dil ki dehleez pe jab dard ne dera dala
Usi veerane se phir noor ka jhara nikla

Main jo gira to mujhe aur bhi qurbat mili
Har shikast mein tera lutf dobara nikla

Har taraf dhoondte phirte the tasalli ka nishan
Dil pe haath aaya to tu hi hamara nikla

Ishq tera hi meri rooh ka aakhri faisla
Har bharam toot ke bas tu hi hamara nikla

"Arsh" hairaan hai is ishq-e-ilahi pe abhi
Dil jo toota to khuda aur bhi pyara nikla
